---
title: "<i> Charm, The</i>"
---

## <i> Charm, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

<i>The Charm: A book for boys and girls</i> Edited by J. C. was published by Addey and ran 1853-55.  It was described by CMY in a letter to Macmillan as ‘a Child’s Magazine . . . which was so contrived that each subject occupied a sheet in each monthly part, and so when bound up all the history could be put together - all the science - all the story. But such a procrustean bed must have been misery to editor and contributors and I fancy was much aided by unlimited woodcut power.’

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
